meta.name: SaaS Product
meta.description: A modern, conversion-focused template for software products and startups

hero_heading.label: Hero Heading
hero_heading.default: The workflow tool your team will actually use

hero_subheading.label: Hero Subheading
hero_subheading.default: Flowdesk brings tasks, docs, and team communication into one beautifully simple workspace. Less switching tabs. More shipping.

social_proof.label: Social Proof Line
social_proof.default: Trusted by 3,200+ teams at companies like Stripe, Linear, and Vercel

feat1_desc.label: Feature 1 Description
feat1_desc.default: Smart tasks auto-assign priorities, surface blockers, and predict completion dates based on your team's velocity.

feat2_title.label: Feature 2 Title
feat2_title.default: Docs that live with your work

feat2_desc.label: Feature 2 Description
feat2_desc.default: Write specs, runbooks, and meeting notes right beside the tasks they're about. Context, always in reach.

feat3_desc.label: Feature 3 Description
feat3_desc.default: See your team's cursor. Edit together. Comment inline. No more stale Notion pages and lost Slack threads.

feat4_desc.label: Feature 4 Description
feat4_desc.default: Sprint velocity, cycle time, and burndown charts are automatically generated. No more manual reporting.

testimonial_text.label: Testimonial Quote
testimonial_text.default: Flowdesk replaced four tools for us. We shipped our last feature in half the time we expected. It's the first productivity tool that actually made us more productive.

pricing_subtext.label: Pricing Subtext
pricing_subtext.default: No per-seat gotchas. No feature walls. Just one price for unlimited teammates.

plan_free_desc.label: Free Plan Description
plan_free_desc.default: Perfect for small teams and solo builders

plan_pro_desc.label: Pro Plan Description
plan_pro_desc.default: Everything you need to ship faster, together

contact_desc.label: Contact Description
contact_desc.default: Have a question, feature request, or just want to say hi? Our team responds within one business day.
